# work-queue

Autonomously implement one ready story end-to-end on an isolated branch and open a pull request.

- **Command:** `/work-queue`
- **Schedule:** :8,38
- **Source:** shortcut (read-write)
- **Required inputs:** `ready_label`, `skip_label`, `in_progress_state`
- **Backend:** `claude`

## Inputs

| Input | Default | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `repos` | — |  |
| `base` | `main` |  |
| `max_open_prs` | `2` |  |

## Gate

`discover.sh` decides whether the daemon fires on a given run.
